title: Illegal Traffic
writer: Robert Yost, Lewis R. Foster, Stuart Anthony
actors: J. Carrol Naish, Mary Carlisle, Robert Preston
plot: G-Man Charles Bent Martin is sent out to break up a nationwide racket. A transport company is aiding fugitives making a getaway in exchange for the lion's share of their loot. Through an old friend, whom he once barnstormed in an ...
